title: Fps Booster Command
description: This mod adds 1 simple command /fps max which increases your fps by a ton
body:
# FPS Max Command Mod

This mod introduces a single, simple command: `/fps max`. When executed, it drastically increases your frames per second (FPS) by unloading all the elements that aren't **ABSOLUTELY REQUIRED FOR THE GAME TO RUN**. 

### Performance Boost
In my **personal experience**, this command boosted my FPS from **280 FPS** to an astonishing **1500 FPS**! Frame **increases may be different in other cases**. Just take a look at the screenshots below:

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/687063c916810d3778b272c4e4ecfccf6adf841f.png)
*Before using /fps max*

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3bc97324114eb76708b20bd7c2dad2af9fbf05.png)
*After using /fps max*

### DISCLAIMER: THIS IS A JOKE
It’s important to note that this mod is a **joke**. While it does increase your FPS it does it by unloading everything except the GUI the **screenshot doesnt show it for some reason but the screen goes black normally**, it’s not meant to be taken seriously. The drastic increase in FPS is just because everything isn't rendered rather than a practical solution. 

### Conclusion
If you’re looking for a fun way to experience a "performance boost" in your game, give the `/fps max` command a try! Just remember, it’s all in good fun! 
### **FULL TRANSPARENCY**
This mod is **JUST A JOKE AND FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY** THIS DOES NOT INCREASES FPS MAGICALLY AND DOES JUST MAKE YOUR SCREEN BLACK.
